title: Meridian
summary: Kirin delivers the population atlas to Dara, a capability broker in Meridian's Trade District and Adaeze's contact of ten years. In the exchange, Kirin learns that Adaeze's entire Sable River placement was designed to prevent the EQU-convertibility play: a scheme by Free Zone financial interests to use a working Rootstock key and the complete Outside population data to file a legitimate equity claim the Compact would be structurally obligated to process. Dara takes the atlas and names her price: one return contact in six months confirming the key is not on the market. Kirin agrees. Separately, Dez's infrastructure contact revises the failure timeline on the corridor's eastern junction components from the twelve-year-old report's conservative estimate to eighteen months to three years — with urgency. The episode ends with Kirin reading the 2122 log entry in which Adaeze identifies Brigid Aelfgar as a Rootstock-adjacent placement and notes she will not approach her.
locations: Meridian Trade District — dyers' lane, second floor above dyers; lodgings above workshop; ring road transit café
themes: what prevention looks like from inside it
continuity_notes: Atlas delivered to Dara — Adaeze's first instruction complete. Dara now holds the complete population atlas, explicitly to keep it out of the EQU-convertibility market. Kirin has committed to one return contact with Dara in six months. The EQU-convertibility play is now named and grounded — Free Zone financial interests plus at least one non-Compact power. Three Rootstock keys accounted for: Kirin's (with her), two with Outside custody, one unaccounted for, two confirmed destroyed. Infrastructure failure timeline revised to 18 months to 3 years. Brigid named as Rootstock-adjacent placement in Adaeze's 2122 log entry. Tomas mentioned in 2118 entry — he saw Adaeze at Kesmark transit post and did not approach; he knew. Dara has been watching the Meridian market for 11 years; a firm in the east financial district has been querying the Rootstock Protocol three times in two months. The man watching Dara's building is from that firm. Next: trace the missing carrier from east (Yusra's mention, Ep 4), before route to Nnedi (Ep 9).
